title: Can I organize/view items by labels across boards?
excerpt: I am looking for a way to sort/organize individual items in one board but across different groups (but I do not have the “Tags” feature).  Is there a way to sort according to the “Dropdown” or “Notes” feature?  For examp…

posts.author: nora.dahlberg (Nora)
posts.cookedHtml: I am looking for a way to sort/organize individual items in one board but across different groups (but I do not have the “Tags” feature). Is there a way to sort according to the “Dropdown” or “Notes” feature? For example: I have a project management board and each group is a different client but I would like to be able to search/sort all the items/projects listed as “Web Dev” and have them pulled from each client group to see all at once.

posts.author: Kim1988 (Kim van der Wijk #monday ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Nora,

Welcome to the Monday community!

Have you tried the ‘group by’ feature?

image2306×1334 332 KB

Otherwise you might be able to achieve this via filters:

image1198×697 112 KB

You can then even save this as a new view!

Let me know if this is what you were looking for

posts.author: nora.dahlberg (Nora)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kim, this was so helpful thank you! I think The “Group By” feature is exactly what I was looking for. I tried it just by labelling items with color names (e.g. green, blue, yellow) and then successfully grouped by those labels.

From here, do you per chance know if I could use that “Group By” feature to mirror in another board? For example, if I wanted to an item in a different workspace to be “Green Projects” and I could mirror all the items labeled “green” in my original workspace?
